title: Self Limiting Conductive Ink
description: Just a bit of fun really.....To support the Twizy Roadtrip and be rewarded with some 'Working Ink', go to https://www.indiegogo.com/projects/fwg-powered-by-paper-roadtrip/x/17951164#/ OR to purchase materials for your own experiments, go to http://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/
